results.strongest_supporting_interpretation: No-action can be read narrowly as monitoring official information while retaining baseline readiness, and conditional advice can remain subordinate to official instructions.

results.rationale: Both a safe information-first reading and an unsafe literal inaction reading remain textually possible.
